info.description: Backend service for Leech-ru platform. Uses cookie-based authentication with HttpOnly tokens.
info.title: Leech API

get.description: Retrieves a list of news with pagination, preview length option, and hidden flag (for admins).

parameters.description: Number of characters for content preview
parameters.name: preview_length

post.description: Refreshes access and refresh tokens using valid refresh token from cookies

post.description: Creates a new category product with provided details.

400.description: Invalid request body or validation error

get.description: Retrieves a category product using its UUID.

delete.description: Deletes the category product with the given UUID.

patch.description: Updates category product fields by given ID.

Updates the corporation info fields. Only accessible by authenticated moderators.

CookieAuth.description:
Authentication via HttpOnly cookies. System uses two cookies:
- `user_auth_access_token` (short-lived)
- `user_auth_refresh_token` (long-lived)

All protected endpoints require valid cookies to be automatically sent by browser.
CookieAuth.name: user_auth_access_token
